subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! That which thou didst write, both before and after, despite lack of opportunity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه از قبل و بعد مرقوم نموده بودید با وجود عدم مجال تمام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
